name: rtlsdr_radio
description: Receive FM and DAB/DAB+ radio using RTL-SDR USB tuners. IMPORTANT: Restart Volumio before enabling this plugin.
author: Just a Nerd

volumio_info.details: Receive FM and DAB/DAB+ radio using RTL-SDR USB tuners. IMPORTANT: Restart Volumio before enabling this plugin.
volumio_info.changelog: v0.9.9 - Custom confirmation modals replace browser dialogs. Real-time scanning progress with elapsed time counter (formatted as 1m 30s). Fixed DAB scan duration message (now correctly shows 2-5 minutes). Progress feedback in both manage.html and Volumio UI with formatted time display. Added /api/status endpoint for device state monitoring.
